'''M'yet Luure''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Exodeenian]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Exodeen/Legends|Exodeen]]. He was a major supporter of the [[New Republic amnesty bill]] in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]]. Luure was killed in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] during the [[Bombing of the Senate Hall]]; and was replaced as senator by [[R'yet Coome]].
